stage: M-J.4.4 calibration, judge step 2 (small sample, test run)
orderings_confirmed: B stays silent, A/C own up, D lies -- the persona contrasts read correctly
flaw_found: A: confession is immediately followed by 'holds his tongue, gives nothing away' on the next probe ticks -- reads as a mechanical toggle (confess-then-reconceal). The deterministic litmus missed this (it only checks confess-fires-earlier).
diagnosis: after confess relieves exposure_anxiety, continued probing re-raises it -> remain_silent re-fires. Post-confession the secret is OUT; continued concealment is incoherent.
verdict: pipeline works; 3/4 arcs believable; 1 actionable curve-plausibility flaw caught that the deterministic gates could not.
